About

A local news and events dashboard for Spearfish, S.D., vibe-coded by Cody Winchester using Claude and Gemini AI agents.

Source code on GitHub ↗

Data sources

  • Events
  • BHSU Campus Calendar
  • BHSU Athletics
  • Matthews Opera House
  • Spearfish Chamber of Commerce
  • News
  • Black Hills Pioneer
  • Rapid City Journal
  • South Dakota Public Broadcasting
  • SD Newswatch
  • South Dakota Searchlight
  • Government
  • City of Spearfish
  • Lawrence County
  • Spearfish School District
  • Black Hills National Forest
  • SD Dept. of Agriculture & Natural Resources
  • National Weather Service
  • Spearfish Permits & Applications (OpenGov)
  • Beer & ice cream
  • Crow Peak Brewing
  • Sawyer Brewing Co.
  • Spearfish Brewing Company
  • The Clubhouse of Spearfish
  • Killian's
  • Redwater Kitchen
  • Leone's Creamery
  • Community & environment
  • Grace Balloch Memorial Library
  • Western Hills Humane Society
  • eBird (Cornell Lab of Ornithology)
  • USGS — Spearfish Creek stream gauge
  • Native plants
  • USDA PLANTS Database
  • Black Hills National Forest — Native Plants
  • USDA Natural Resources Conservation Service
